CONTENT.Playing career: Mamutovic is a youth product of SG Unterrath, Bayer Leverkusen and Bergisch Gladbach.  He began his senior career with Bergisch Gladbach in the Regionalliga in 2019. He spent the 2021–22 season with Rot Weiss Ahlen. On 20 May 2022, he moved to Mainz, where he was originally assigned to their reserves. On 15 December 2023, he signed his first professional contract with Mainz until 2025. He made his professional debut with the senior Mainz team as a late substitute in a 1–0 Bundesliga loss to Heidenheim on 16 December 2023.
CONTENT.International career: Born in Germany, Mamutovic is of Serbian and Polish descent.He was called up to a training camp with the Germany U15s.

SUMMARY: David Mamutovic (Serbian: Давид Мамутовић, romanized: David Mamutović; born 5 December 2000) is a German professional footballer who plays as a winger for Bundesliga club Mainz.
